texto: You stop accepting yourself and stop connecting three realms of the triangle of awareness within you. You fail to realize that this is mistaken notion that "a lighter you is a happier you" isn't making you happier at all.
explicacao: Citação de Scott Abel sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “You stop accepting yourself and stop connecting three realms of the triangle of awareness within …” articula motivacao, fitness, mindset em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como academia e inspiracao.

frase_original: You stop accepting yourself and stop connecting three realms of the triangle of awareness within you. You fail to realize that this is mistaken notion that "a lighter you is a happier you" isn't making you happier at all.

texto: Can we talk real for a minute then? Do you "really" think that your problem is that you just need to gather more information and data before you start to "do" better with your commitment to yourself? Or isn't the real truth more like -> you are already educated with enough information - beyond your level of behavioral obedience to what you already know! You don't need to "know more" to get going- you simply need to buckle down and get real about "doing better" with what you already know.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Scott Abel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Can we talk real for a minute then? Do you "really" think that your problem is that you just need…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, information, internet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de internet e vida.
